title: Breaking Bad
description: A high school chemistry teacher diagnosed with cancer turns to manufacturing methamphetamine to secure his family's future, descending into the criminal underworld.

title: Game of Thrones
description: Noble families wage a brutal war for control of the Iron Throne while an ancient supernatural threat rises in the frozen north and dragons return to the world.

title: Stranger Things
description: In a small 1980s town, a group of kids confront supernatural forces and secret government experiments after one of their friends vanishes into a parallel dimension.

title: Friends
description: Six friends in their twenties and thirties navigate love, careers and life in New York City, spending much of their time in a Manhattan coffee house.

title: Rick and Morty
description: A cynical genius scientist drags his anxious grandson on absurd, dangerous adventures across infinite dimensions in this adult animated sci-fi comedy.

title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
description: A team of forensic investigators in Las Vegas uses physical evidence to solve grisly murders, reconstructing crimes from the smallest traces.
